    Graph.Path
    Graph.Path.addSegment(Edge newEdge, double weightToAdd, LocalTime newArrivalTime)
    Kreira novu putanju kopirajuci postojecu i dodajuci novu granu i cvor.
    Graph.Path
    Graph.findOptimalRoute(String startNodeId, String endNodeId, Graph.OptimizationCriteria criteria)
    Implementira Dijkstrin algoritam za pronalazenje optimalne rute izmedju dvije stanice.
